Agent.//ShowPopup: When true (default), a received broadcast is shown on-screen to logged-in users via msg.exe. Set false to log-only.
Agent.//CertThumbprint: PREFERRED: thumbprint of a server-auth cert in LocalMachine\My (e.g. AD CS-issued). Trusted domain-wide, no private key on disk. Takes precedence over CertPath.
Agent.//CertPath: Fallback: path to a PFX whose SAN matches this host's FQDN. Used only when CertThumbprint is empty. Empty CertPath = ASP.NET dev cert (local testing only).
Agent.//CertPassword: For production, supply via user-secrets or an environment variable, NOT this file.
